hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes posterior chain and core; push/arm work recovers faster and builds balanced hypertrophy.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 5 Deadlifts @ 100/60kg, 10 T2B, 15 Wall Balls. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, shoulders (lateral/rear), biceps.
